seoTitle: Rouchel vs Roughit — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rouchel and Roughit. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rouchel and Roughit.
heading: Rouchel vs Roughit — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rouchel, New South Wales and Roughit, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Roughit has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Rouchel (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rouchel or Roughit safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rouchel has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Roughit scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rouchel scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Roughit scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rouchel or Roughit?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Roughit has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
